title: Building a new enterprise AI services company with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs
content: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. Research Economic Futures Commitments Learn News Try Claude Announcements Building a new enterprise AI services company with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs May 4, 2026 Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs announced the formation of a new AI services company. The organization will work with mid-sized companies across sectors to bring Claude into their most important operations. Applied AI engineers from Anthropic will work alongside the firm’s engineering team to identify where Claude can have the most impact, build custom solutions, and support customers over the long term. Alongside the founding partners, the new company is backed by a consortium of leading alternative asset managers including General Atlantic, Leonard Green, Apollo Global Management, GIC, and Sequoia Capital. Putting Claude to work in an organization’s core operations takes hands-on engineering and deep familiarity with how each business runs. Systems integrators in the Claude Partner Network lead that work for the world’s largest enterprises today, and we are continuing to invest deeply in those partnerships as Claude reaches more customers. This new firm extends that delivery capacity further. Companies from community banks to mid-sized manufacturers and regional health systems stand to gain from AI, but lack the in-house resources to build and run frontier deployments. “Enterprise demand for Claude is significantly outpacing any single deli
eventKey: building-new-enterprise-services-company-blackstone
normalizedTitle: building a new enterprise ai services company with blackstone hellman friedman and goldman sachs
scoreReasoning: AI产品形态关键变化：顶级AI公司与金融巨头联手推进企业级服务。信号极强，用户核心关注。
summary: Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs have created a new AI services firm to embed Claude into mid‑size companies’ core operations. The company will deploy Anthropic’s Applied AI engineers with its own team to identify high‑impact use cases, build custom Claude solutions, and provide ongoing support. Backed by major alternative asset managers, it will work across sectors—such as health care, finance, and manufacturing—to deliver tailored AI tools that integrate into existing workflows.

title: LWiAI Podcast #243 - GPT 5.5, DeepSeek V4, AI safety sabotage
content: Our 243rd episode with a summary and discussion of last week’s big AI news! LWiAI Podcast #243 - GPT 5.5, DeepSeek V4, AI safety sabotage 2 1× 0:00 Current time: 0:00 / Total time: -1:52:22 -1:52:22 Audio playback is not supported on your browser. Please upgrade. LWiAI Podcast #243 - GPT 5.5, DeepSeek V4, AI safety sabotage Last Week in AI May 04, 2026 12 2 Share Transcript Our 243rd episode with a summary and discussion of last week’s big AI news! Hosted by Andrey Kurenkov and Jeremie Harris Feel free to email us your questions and feedback at andreyvkurenkov@gmail.com and/or hello@gladstone.ai OpenAI released GPT-5.5 with strong coding-oriented improvements, a system card discussing chain-of-thought monitorability and misalignment testing, higher pricing than GPT-5.4, and notable quirks like a system-prompt warning about “goblins.” xAI launched Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0, claiming large benchmark leads for real-time voice agents and reporting major Starlink customer-support automation and sales conversion impact.
source: Last Week in AI - Last Week in AI
eventKey: lwiai-podcast-243-gpt-deepseek-safety
normalizedTitle: lwiai podcast 243 - gpt 5 5 deepseek v4 ai safety sabotage
representativeSources: Last Week in AI - Last Week in AI
scoreReasoning: 专业 AI 播客，覆盖 GPT-5.5、DeepSeek V4 等关键模型能力与安全动态。
summary: The 243rd LWiAI Podcast covers recent AI developments: OpenAI launched GPT‑5.5 with enhanced coding capabilities, stricter pricing, and new system‑card monitoring, while xAI released Grok‑Voice Think‑Fast 1.0 for real‑time voice agents. DeepSeek opened V4 featuring MoE scaling and 1M‑token context, and Tencent previewed Hunyuan‑3 with limited benchmark gains. New benchmarks and safety research highlighted low success rates and potential sabotage. Major business moves include Google’s $40 B investment in Anthropic, Meta’s AWS Graviton deal, and legal disputes over Meta’s Manus acquisition.

title: Sarah Rogers: Free Speech, AI Diplomacy, and What America Owes Its Allies
content: Sarah Rogers, U.S. Under Secretary for Public Diplomacy, discusses how AI, free speech, and global information systems intersect. She examines how technological revolutions—from the printing press to the internet to AI—reshape communication and power, and why the current AI moment may be even more consequential. Rogers warns against censorship and overregulation, stresses the need for “AI with a Western soul,” and explains how governments view AI as both a national security priority and a tool for global influence.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Katherine Boyle, Sarah B. Rogers)
eventKey: sarah-rogers-free-speech-diplomacy-what
normalizedTitle: sarah rogers free speech ai diplomacy and what america owes its allies
representativeSources: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Katherine Boyle, Sarah B. Rogers)
scoreReasoning: 美国官方从地缘政治和言论自由角度阐述 AI 外交，是政策监管的重要风向。
summary: Sarah Rogers, U.S. Under Secretary for Public Diplomacy, discusses how AI, free speech, and global information systems intersect. She examines how technological revolutions—from the printing press to the internet to AI—reshape communication and power, and why the current AI moment may be even more consequential. Rogers warns against censorship and overregulation, stresses the need for “AI with a Western soul,” and explains how governments view AI as both a national security priority and a tool for global influence.

title: 豆包将在免费模式外新增付费订阅，推出三档月包/年包价格｜最前线
content: 相关方案细节目前还在测试阶段，正式上线时会通过官方渠道发布完整信息。 豆包将在免费模式外新增付费订阅，推出三档月包/年包价格｜最前线 李小霞 · 2026年05月04日 17:49 近日，豆包App Store页面出现付费版本服务声明。声明称，为更好地服务专业用户，豆包将在免费版的基础上，推出包含更多增值服务的付费版本。同时，该页面还披露了三档订阅价格：标准版连续包月每月68元（连续包年688元）、加强版连续包月每月200元（连续包年2048元）、专业版连续包月每月500元（连续包年5088元）。 豆包 目前，尚未在豆包产品中看到相关的付费选项和功能。豆包官方回应称，“豆包始终提供免费服务，在免费服务的基础上，豆包也在探索推出更多增值服务，以满足不同用户的差异化需求。相关方案细节目前还在测试阶段，正式上线时会通过官方渠道发布完整信息。” 据接近豆包的人士透露，付费功能将主要专注在复杂任务和生产力场景，如PPT生成、数据分析、影视制作等。随着模型能力持续升级，产品已经能满足越来越多的复杂高价值任务。但此类任务需消耗更多算力与推理时间，因此豆包计划上线付费服务，满足好这部分复杂场景需求。免费版本则继续面向用户的日常使用。 本文由「 李小霞 」原创出品， 转载或内容合作请点击 转载说明 ；违规转载必究。 寻求报道 最近内容 豆包将在免费模式外新增付费订阅，推出三档月包/年包价格｜最前线 8小时前 错过第一波投影上市潮后，索诺克想靠「枭龙系列」实现超车｜项目报道 2026-04-30 商务合作 关于我们 联系我们 加入我们 36氪欧洲站 36氪欧洲站 36氪欧洲站 Ai产品日报
eventKey: 豆包将在免费模式外新增付费订阅-推出三档月包-年包价格｜最前线
normalizedTitle: 豆包将在免费模式外新增付费订阅 推出三档月包 年包价格｜最前线
scoreReasoning: 国内主流 AI 产品推出收费分层，反映了 AI 模型商业化和产品形态的实际变化。
summary: 豆包App 将在免费版基础上推出付费订阅，提供标准、加强和专业三档月/年套餐，价格分别为68元/月(688元/年)、200元/月(2048元/年)和500元/月(5088元/年)。正式功能尚未上线，官方称仍在测试中。付费服务将聚焦复杂任务与生产力场景，如 PPT 制作、数据分析和影视编辑，以满足对算力与推理时间要求更高的用户需求。免费版将继续支持日常使用。
